title: Development Control Plane V1
purpose: Create one agent-neutral system for planning, executing, pausing, validating, and delivering Locaily development milestones.
problem: Development status is spread across files, agents, conversations, and local working state.
acceptanceCriteria: Any supported coding agent can determine current project state from repository files
An agent can start, resume, pause, complete, and deliver a milestone using documented commands
Pause records contain enough detail for another agent to resume
Milestone delivery refuses work that has not passed its required validation profile
